Compute enrichment of IMPACT scores

Source: R/IMPACT_enrichment.R
IMPACT_compute_enrichment.Rd

Conduct IMPACT enrichment between SNP groups and fine-mapping methods. Enrichment is computed as the ratio of IMPACT signal in a SNP group to the proportion of SNPs in that group.

Usage

IMPACT_compute_enrichment(annot_melt, locus = NULL)

Arguments

annot_melt

A melted data.table of IMPACT annotations with columns including IMPACT_score, SNP, TF, Tissue, Cell, CellDeriv, and various fine-mapping result columns.

locus

Optional locus name to add to the output.

Value

A data.table of enrichment results per SNP group and annotation.

See also

Other IMPACT: IMPACT_files, IMPACT_get_annotation_key(), IMPACT_get_annotations(), IMPACT_get_ldscores(), IMPACT_get_top_annotations(), IMPACT_heatmap(), IMPACT_iterate_enrichment(), IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations(), IMPACT_plot_enrichment(), IMPACT_plot_impact_score(), IMPACT_postprocess_annotations(), IMPACT_process(), IMPACT_query(), IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot(), hierarchical_colors(), prepare_mat_meta()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
enrich <- IMPACT_compute_enrichment(annot_melt = annot_melt,
                                    locus = "BST1")
} # }
